Package com.dua3.utility.fx.controls

Class ObjectInputControlState<R>

java.lang.Object
com.dua3.utility.fx.controls.InputControlState<R>
com.dua3.utility.fx.controls.ObjectInputControlState<R>
Type Parameters:
R - the type of the value being managed
public class ObjectInputControlState<R> extends InputControlState<R>
Implementation of InputControlState for standard objects.

  • Constructor Details

    • ObjectInputControlState

      public ObjectInputControlState(javafx.beans.property.Property<@Nullable R> value, Supplier<? extends @Nullable R> dflt)
      Constructs an instance of ObjectInputControlState with the specified value property, default value supplier, and validation function.
      Parameters:
      value - the Property holding the value being managed, which may be nullable
      dflt - a Supplier providing the default value, which may be nullable

    • ObjectInputControlState

      public ObjectInputControlState(javafx.beans.property.Property<@Nullable R> value, Supplier<? extends @Nullable R> dflt, Function<? super @Nullable R,Optional<String>> validate)
      Constructs an instance of ObjectInputControlState for managing input control state with custom validation and optional base value tracking.
      Parameters:
      value - the property holding the current value of the input control
      dflt - a supplier providing the default value for the input control
      validate - a function that performs validation on the input value and returns an Optional containing an error message if validation fails, or an empty Optional if validation passes

    • ObjectInputControlState

      public ObjectInputControlState(javafx.beans.property.Property<@Nullable R> value, Supplier<? extends @Nullable R> dflt, Function<? super @Nullable R,Optional<String>> validate, javafx.beans.value.ObservableValue<?> baseValue)
      Constructs an instance of ObjectInputControlState to manage the state of an object input control.
      Parameters:
      value - A Property containing the current value of the input control. Changes to this value will trigger validation and state updates.
      dflt - A Supplier that provides the default value for the input control. The supplier can return null to indicate no default value.
      validate - A Function that validates the input's value. It takes a value of type R or null and returns an Optional containing an error message if validation fails, or an empty Optional if the value is valid.
      baseValue - An ObservableValue that represents an external factor affecting the input control. Changes to this value will trigger state invalidation.

  • Method Details

    • valueProperty

      protected javafx.beans.property.Property<@Nullable R> valueProperty()
      Description copied from class: InputControlState
      Provides access to the property representing the current value of the input control. The value can be updated or observed for changes.
      Specified by:
      valueProperty in class InputControlState<R>
      Returns:
      the value property
      See Also:
      • InputControlState.getValue()
      • InputControlState.setValue(R)
